creator: freebsd@jonathanprice.org
text:
(In reply to Ultima from comment #2)

Hello, and thanks for the quick reply.

I believe i'm having some trouble implementing your fix in login.conf. I have made the following modification:
Before:
daemon:\
        :memorylocked=128M:\

After:
daemon:\
        :memorylocked=512M:\

I then ran cap_mkdb login.conf, and attempted to start the daemon. At this point I received the same error in the TeamSpeak logs.

Could you please confirm that I am implementing your suggestion correctly?
